subcodes.first_line: O two blessed souls! In these days events have transpired that have wholly confined 'Abdu'l-Bahá to His sickbed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس مبارک در این ایام حوادثی میرسد که بکلی عبدالبهاء را اسیر فراش نموده
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
